title: conyza microglossa
intro: Conyza microglossa, also known as small-leaved fleabane or small fleabane, is a plant species native to the Americas and is a member of the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Conyza microglossa include reducing inflammation and pain, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Conyza microglossa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
